items.title: Human-in-the-loop
items.snippet:
The Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) middleware lets you add human oversight to agent tool calls.
When a model proposes an action that might require review — for example, writing to a file or executing SQL — the middleware can pause execution and wait for a decision. It does this by checking each tool call against a configurable policy. If intervention is needed, the middleware issues an interrupt that ha
